summary: First-finish smoke: backend + frontend both healthy. All 3 API endpoints return correct shapes. End-to-end onboarding flow (landing -> persona -> career -> journey -> scan -> results) completes and renders all charts + recommendations. Model discriminates correctly (doctor=Low 13.6%, cashier=High 79.1%, data_entry=High 85.1%, software_engineer=Medium 43.5%).
passed: POST /api/predict (software_engineer) -> 200: prob 43.5, risk Medium, 6 score_cards, 6 radar axes, 6 pie, 4 trend points (2025/2027/2030/2035), 5 top_ai_factors, 6 skills (in 5-7 range), 5 alternatives, 3 insights
Persona professional selection + Continue advances to step-2
Career search 'soft' filters and career-software_engineer selectable
Step-3: exp-2-5, edu-bachelor, ai-usage-slider (via keyboard) all interact; Run Analysis becomes enabled
Step-4 scanning shown then auto-navigates to /results within ~15s
Results dashboard: gauge-card, risk-badge, radar-card, pie-card, trend-card, 6 score cards, 5 factors, 6 skills, 5 alternatives, final-cta all visible
Theme toggle works on both landing and results
notes: score_cards query using [data-testid^=score-] returned 7 because it also matches the 'score-grid' container; the 6 actual score-<key> cards render correctly (verified visually in screenshot).
